howItWorks.intro: This pregnancy weight gain calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Weekly Rate
rules.explanation: Steady gain after the first trimester.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much weight should I gain?
faq.a: 25-35 lbs for normal BMI, 15-25 for overweight, 28-40 for underweight.

faq.q: When does most weight gain occur?
faq.a: Most weight gain happens in the 2nd and 3rd trimesters.
